zh.Stanton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓
zh.Stanton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦頓
zh.St. Mary's Churchyard, Staunton, Newark: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Staunton於大約1530年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親Anthony Staunton60歲，母親Edith Neville54歲。他於大約1551年與Bridgett Barwick在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾布爾可特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Staunton于大约1530年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲Anthony Staunton60岁，母亲Edith Neville54岁。他于大约1551年与Bridgett Barwick在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾布爾可特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦頓，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Staunton was born about 1530, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anthony Staunton, was 60 and his mother, Edith Neville, was 54. He married Bridgett Barwick about 1551, in Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1326, in Stanton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Staunton est né environ 1530, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anthony Staunton, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Edith Neville, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Bridgett Barwick environ 1551, à Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1326, à Stanton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Staunton um 1530 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anthony Staunton 60 und seine Mutter Edith Neville 54. Er hat um 1551 in Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Bridgett Barwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1326 in Stanton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Staunton è nato il circa 1530 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Anthony Staunton, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Edith Neville, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Bridgett Barwick circa 1551, nel Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1326, nel Stanton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Staunton, Newark, Nottinghamshire, Engla: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントン

ja.St. Mary's Churchyard, Staunton, Newark: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントン
ja.lifeSummary: William Stauntonが約1530年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父Anthony Stauntonは60歳，母Edith Nevilleは54歳であった。約1551年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアブルコトでBridgett Barwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスタントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Staunton(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Staunton(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith Neville(은)는 54세였다. 그는 대략 1551년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 버컷에서 Bridgett Barwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Staunton nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anthony Staunton, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Edith Neville, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridgett Barwick aproximadamente 1551, em Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1326, em Stanton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Staunton родился около 1530 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anthony Staunton было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith Neville, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridgett Barwick около 1551 г. в местности булкот, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности стантон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Staunton nació aproximadamente 1530, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Anthony Staunton, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Edith Neville, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Bridgett Barwick aproximadamente 1551, en Bulcote, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1326, en Stanton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
